meaning: n.底栖鱼,底层鱼(指生活于海底的鱼,如鳕等)
examples: Some groundfish, like cod, swims down to try to break out.
But other groundfish, like cod, swim down to try to break out.
GROUNDFISH: Redfish prices are stable at a moderate level. Prices for deep-water fishing product remain high.
